## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss updates on Marcel's engagements with clients like Home Base and Hyper Mode, share learnings, and align on processes for onboarding and servicing new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is seeing good traction with early clients like Home Base and is refining content workflows and prompting approaches](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Need to determine best way to interlink/mention client's brand and CTAs in generated content](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Clients are interested in plagiarism checks on final output](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Opportunity to create shared repository of proven prompts/templates](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Align on packaging/pricing for different client needs (self-serve, strategy/implementation support, fully managed)](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Plan to have Marcel join an upcoming sales opportunity to collaborate on onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

## Topics

### Client Engagements and Learnings

  - [Home Base engagement going well, client excited by SEM rush integration potential](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Iterating on prompts based on feedback, e.g. writing style, length, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Developing playbooks and content workflow management system tailored to each client](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Providing strategy, e.g. content/keyword roadmaps, competitor research](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Showing value in cost savings vs. traditional content creation](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Prompts and Templates

  - [Need help determining when/how to add brand mentions, CTAs to prompts](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Exploring ways to handle "do not mention" lists in prompts](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Clients interested in plagiarism checks on output](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Opportunity to create shared repository of proven prompts/templates](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### Onboarding and Processes

  - [Detailed onboarding process in week 1 (stakeholders, expectations, research, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Weeks 2-3 focused on calibration, integrating with client's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Weeks 4-5 refinement based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Continuous publishing, optimization, refreshing content](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Opportunity to make onboarding more efficient over time](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Plan to have Marcel join an upcoming sales opportunity to collaborate](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

### Packaging and Pricing

  - [Three segments: self-serve, strategy/implementation support, fully managed](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Higher priority on "implementation support" where client gets initial setup/training](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Align on minimum viable pricing for different segments](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Potential to offer free audit/analysis to warm leads](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to share onboarding checklist and recording](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Set up shared workspace to house prompt/template library](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Discuss minimum viable pricing for different client segments](https://fathom.video/share/TEad3QyVAGBNmbZUBEX33EMRY3n431ks?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
